creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
We have tomcat10 and tomcat101, had in past tomcat7 and tomcat8.
Tomcat 9.10 => tomcat910.
Why we need to rename tomcat9 to tomcat90?
I planned to rename tomcat101 to tomcat10 after remove tomcat 10.0 from ports in July.

P.S. I can't update tomcat-devel to 11.0.0-M7 - required Java 21, but ports have 19 only and 21 will be released in September only.
